manageAccountsDesc: Here you can manage all logged-in accounts, switch workspaces, or remove login information no longer needed.
manageAccountsDescShort: Select or switch between logged-in accounts
logoutAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out of all accounts?
removeAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this account locally? You will need to log in again to access it.
agreementPrefix: I have read and agree to the
deleteConfirmPhrase: I know I am deleting my account
registrationDisabledDesc: User registration is currently disabled by system administrator.
registrationEmailConfigMissing: SMTP is not configured, so email registration is unavailable.
registrationSmsConfigMissing: SMS webhook is not configured, so phone registration is unavailable.
captchaRequired: For security, please enter the captcha
deviceLimitDesc: Your account is active on {{count}} devices (Max: {{max}}). Please select and revoke one or more sessions to continue.
defaultPasswordDesc: For your security, it is highly recommended to change the default 'admin888' password.
nextcloudLoginIntroLegacy: After sign-in, access will be handed back to the Nextcloud client to finish account setup.
nextcloudLoginIntroV2: Sign in with your FileUni account. When authorization succeeds, return to the Nextcloud client to continue.
nextcloudGrantNote: This authorization is only used for the current Nextcloud client connection and does not change your existing WebUI login session.
nextcloudLoginCompletedDesc: Return to the Nextcloud client to finish the connection.
nextcloudReturnHintV2: Return to the Nextcloud client after authorization completes.
nextcloudReturnHintLegacy: After authorization, the browser will try to return to the Nextcloud client automatically.
